No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to health or well-being outcomes.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary education (4.3), develops language skills for work (4.4), and fosters humanistic literacy and cultural appreciation (4.7).
evidence: 培養學生具備...工作所需之語言能力
培養學生具備人文素養，知曉日本社會與歷史文化

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops language skills for work (8.5), fosters innovation (8.2), and promotes cultural understanding which can support sustainable tourism (8.9). Respecting copyright also aligns with fair economic practices.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course fosters individual creativity and innovation through the production of 'dubbing works,' aligning with Target 9.5 on enhancing innovation and technological capabilities.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course targets non-native Japanese speakers, promoting social inclusion (10.2) by providing a dedicated learning environment and fostering an international perspective.
evidence: 日本語非母語話者を対象としたもの

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course directly engages with and promotes understanding of Japan's cultural heritage through various literary and media works, strongly supporting Target 11.4.
evidence: 夏目漱石「吾輩は猫である」
宮沢賢治「雨ニモマケズ」

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The explicit instruction to 'Respect Copyright' and use legitimate books promotes responsible consumption of creative works and ethical practices, aligning with sustainable lifestyles.
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to climate change or environmental action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to marine ecosystems or life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Respecting copyright aligns with upholding the rule of law (16.3), and fostering an international perspective contributes to mutual understanding and peaceful societies.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course fosters an international perspective and international mobility, developing foundational skills for global partnerships and knowledge sharing (17.6, 17.9).
evidence: 培養學生具備國際觀、國際移動力
